'''Shadow Saber squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] made up of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pilots flying [[StealthX]] fighters, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyp Durron]]. It was one of the six squadrons which compromised the [[StealthX wing]] led by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>
